# Shubham Sunny
> Developers for Businesses With a Vision. We do not take every project. If you have a clear goal and care about quality, we can talk. Websites, data work, and custom software — founder-led, with a small core team and trusted specialists when a build needs extra hands.

- Primary topics: website modernization, data scraping, custom software development
- Audience: US and global business owners, startups, and enterprises
- Keywords: website redesign, data scraping, web app development, mobile app, chrome extension, telegram bot

## Services
- Website Modernization: Modern, mobile-first websites that convert visitors into customers.
- Data Scraping: Competitor intelligence, product catalogs, images — scraped cleanly and delivered ready to use.
- Custom Software: From web apps to Android apps, Chrome extensions, and Telegram/WhatsApp bots.

## Portfolio
- Restaurant Website Redesign (Food & Hospitality): Mobile-first menu and click-to-call — client asked to keep branding private.
- Dental Clinic Modernization (Healthcare): Online booking and trust-first design — live demo withheld per clinic NDA.
- High-Performance Data Dashboard (Data & Analytics): Handles 1M+ records with instant search.
- Offline-First Business App (Retail): Works without internet — syncs when back online.
- Smart Admin Platform (Enterprise): Update pages without redeploying.
- Plugin Marketplace Platform (SaaS): Add features without rebuilding the core product.
## Before & After
- Local Dental Clinic (Healthcare): Their 2015 template looked outdated on phones. We rebuilt it with clear booking buttons and a modern, trustworthy design.
- Family Restaurant (Food & Hospitality): Slow, cluttered homepage → clean menu, hours, and click-to-call. Customers started calling from mobile within the first week.
- Law Office (Professional Services): Generic template → premium look that matches their reputation. Clear practice areas and a simple contact form.

## FAQ
- Q: Do you take every project? A: Not every one. We pick work where the goal is clear and we can do it properly — if we say yes, you get our full attention.
- Q: Website modernization — what do I get? A: A mobile-first site that loads fast and makes calling or booking easy. Hosting, SSL, and handoff included.
- Q: Is data scraping legal? A: We collect publicly visible data only — no private logins. Every project starts with a scope review.
- Q: What is custom software? A: Web apps, mobile apps, bots, and tools built for your workflow when off-the-shelf products do not fit.
- Q: Price and timeline? A: Websites from ~$800. Scraping from ~$200. Custom software after discovery. Most web projects: 2–4 weeks.
- Q: Do I need technical knowledge? A: No. We handle servers, code, and deployment — you approve outcomes in plain English.
- Q: US / UK time zones? A: Yes. We schedule calls and updates around your timezone.
- Q: How do we start? A: Use the contact form at the bottom of the page — we reply within one business day.
- Q: Do you build WhatsApp or Telegram bots? A: Yes — order bots, lead qualifiers, and customer support flows. We scope the conversation, build it, and hand over docs so your team can run it.
- Q: Can you work with my existing hosting? A: Usually yes. We can redesign on your current host or migrate to something faster — we document logins and handoff either way.
- Q: What support do I get after launch? A: Every project includes a handoff guide. Optional monthly care covers updates, backups, and small content changes so you are not stuck alone.
- Q: Will you sign an NDA? A: Yes, for client work that needs confidentiality. Many portfolio pieces stay private — we are used to working under NDA.

## About
A selective team of developers for premium clients with a vision — not a factory that takes every job. If you care about quality, clarity, and long-term results, you are in the right place.
Philosophy: We say no to most inquiries — so the yes means something.
## Stats
- 163+ projects delivered
- 120+ happy clients
- 8+ years experience
- Rating: 4.9/5
## Roadmap
- Website Modernization (available): Transform your outdated website into a modern, mobile-friendly site that builds trust.
- AI Website Chatbot (coming_soon): Answers visitor questions 24/7 on your website — so you never miss a lead.
- Lead Generation Tools (planned): Capture visitor details and follow up automatically — grow your pipeline.
- Private Document Chat (planned): Chat with your business documents securely — for teams that need answers fast.
## Blog
- 5 Signs Your Website Is Costing You Customers: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/signs-your-website-is-costing-customers — If your site looks outdated on mobile or takes forever to load, you are losing business every day. Here is what to watch for.
- What Mobile-Friendly Actually Means (Plain English): https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/what-mobile-friendly-means — No jargon — just what mobile-friendly means for your business and why it matters for US customers.
- How Long Does a Website Redesign Take?: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/how-long-website-redesign-takes — A realistic timeline for small business website projects — from first call to launch.
- When Does Data Scraping Actually Make Sense?: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/when-data-scraping-makes-sense — Stop copy-pasting from competitor sites — here is when automation pays for itself (and when it does not).
- Why We Do Not Take Every Project: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/why-we-do-not-take-every-project — We say no to most inquiries on purpose. Here is what we look for — and what you get when we say yes.
- WhatsApp Bots for Local Business — Worth It?: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/whatsapp-bots-for-local-business — If customers message you on WhatsApp at 9 PM, a structured bot beats a messy inbox every time.
